# Privacy Policy Draft

This draft must be reviewed before publication. Replace placeholders with the final company, website and support details.

## Product

BIM Command Center for Revit

## Publisher

LUA BIM LABS

## Data We May Process

Depending on enabled features, the add-in may process:

- Revit project and model metadata required to perform local commands
- Workset, element, view, parameter and model health information
- Autodesk App Store entitlement status
- Autodesk login user identifier returned by Revit for Store entitlement verification
- Diagnostic information needed to troubleshoot installation or add-in errors

## Local Processing

Core Revit automation commands are intended to run locally inside Autodesk Revit. Model data should not leave the user's computer unless a cloud, AI, support or update feature is explicitly enabled and disclosed.

## Network Access

If enabled, the product may use network access for:

- License activation or entitlement checks
- Update checks
- Local dashboard communication
- AI or cloud-assisted features
- Support diagnostics requested by the user

The first Store release should disable external AI features unless the final privacy policy, cost controls and data handling rules are complete.

## Data Sharing

We do not sell customer model data. Data may be shared only with service providers required for licensing, support, hosting or AI processing, and only when the relevant product feature requires it.

## Payments

Payment method details such as card numbers, CVV, bank account details, PayPal credentials or BlueSnap credentials are not collected by BIM Command Center. Paid subscription purchase and billing are handled through Autodesk App Store supported payment flows and payment processors such as PayPal or BlueSnap.

## User Control

Users may contact support to request license help, activation reset, data questions or deletion of stored support information.

## Contact

Support email: `support@your-domain.example`

## Pre-Publication Tasks

- Replace support email and website.
- Confirm final Autodesk App Store App ID and entitlement behavior.
- Confirm that the commercial license flow does not collect phone, email or machine ID.
- Confirm that no payment method details are collected or logged by the add-in.
- Confirm whether any model data is sent outside the customer machine.
- Confirm whether Telegram, OpenAI, local dashboard server or other services are used in the shipped commercial add-in.
